messages.disconnectConfirmation: Do you really want to disconnect?

fields.removeOutlookCalendarEventIfRemovedInEsp: Remove Microsoft event upon removal in EspoCRM
fields.calendarCreateContacts: Create contacts for attendees in EspoCRM
fields.calendarDontPushPastEvents: Don't push old events to Microsoft
fields.calendarSyncAttendees: Sync attendees from Espo to Microsoft

tooltips.calendarEntityTypes: For type recognizing event name has to start from identification label. Label for default entity can be empty. Recommendation: Do not change identification labels after you saved sync setting
tooltips.calendarDefaultEntity: Unrecognized Event will be loaded as selected entity.
tooltips.calendarDontPushPastEvents: If checked, only recently created events will be pushed to Microsoft.
tooltips.calendarSyncAttendees:
In enabled, attendees of meetings and calls created in Espo will be synced to Microsoft.

Attendees are always synced if an online meeting is created regardless of the parameter value.

User attendees are always synced regardless of the parameter value.
